headline: Here's Why You Should Retain Equifax Stock in Your Portfolio for Now
summary: EFX gains from AI-driven analytics, acquisitions, and rich data assets as earnings. Revenues are set for steady double-digit growth through 2027.

headline: Equifax Canada Offering ReadyResponse from Breachlink, a Breach Response Coordination Service to Help Empower and Protect Businesses
summary: TORONTO, March 19, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Equifax® Canada, a global data, analytics, and technology company, today announced that it is now offering Equifax customers access to ReadyResponse from Breachlink, a leading provider of data breach preparedness, coordination, and incident management. This comprehensive service helps small and mid-sized businesses (SMBs) prepare for, respond to, and recover from cybersecurity incidents, equipping businesses with the roadmap and connections to effectiv

headline: Is Equifax (EFX) Offering Value After A 23% One Year Share Price Slide?
summary: If you are wondering whether Equifax at US$183.79 is offering fair value or not, it helps to step back and look at what the recent share price and fundamentals are really telling you. The stock has seen a 4.1% decline over the past week, a 4.7% decline over the past month, and is down 14.1% year to date and 23.5% over the past year. These moves may have changed how the market is pricing its future potential and risks. Recent coverage has focused on Equifax's position in credit reporting and...
